name: Carlos Mendez
notes: Operates a WhatsApp-native bodega network in Caracas -- manages orders for 3 informal retail locations entirely via group chats. High signal for TOO-001 and INV-001 pain clusters. Potential design partner for any VE commerce tooling.

name: Sofia Ramos
notes: Full-stack engineer with 5 years in LATAM fintech -- built payment rail integrations for a Colombian neobank, familiar with Binance API and USDT settlement flows. Strong candidate for any CBR-001 or PAY-001 product build.

name: Marta Vidal
notes: Former growth lead at a Spanish SaaS company -- scaled email and lifecycle programs to 200k users. Relevant for CAC-001 positioning (LATAM SMBs with no digital marketing) and for advising on CRM tooling in Spanish-speaking markets.
